changes.description: Replaced verbose generic SKILL.md (573 lines of SQL, pandas, visualization, statistical tests) with concise targeted version (70 lines) focused on the three task types: CSV cleaning, pivot/aggregation, and multi-dataset analysis. Removed unused files: scripts/data-init.sh, scripts/query.sh, WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv, _meta.json.
